summary: The diff implements TimeControls component insertion below the Global Control button in the left panel of LocationMapExplorer.tsx, with time state management and animation logic. REQ-1 and REQ-2 appear substantially addressed, but there is a critical gap: InteractiveGlobe is not shown receiving the currentTime/tcCurrentDate prop for terminator positioning, which is the core wiring requirement of REQ-2. The diff also shows an unused showTimeControls state variable that may indicate incomplete toggle logic.

missing_requirements.requirement: Wire up the time state from LocationMapExplorer so the terminator on the InteractiveGlobe updates in response to the time controls.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows time state (tcCurrentDate) managed in LocationMapExplorer.tsx and the animation loop in place, but there is no evidence in the truncated diff that InteractiveGlobe receives the currentTime/tcCurrentDate prop or that InteractiveGlobe.tsx was modified to accept and use a time prop for terminator positioning. InteractiveGlobe.tsx does not appear in the modified files list at all.

hallucinated_features.description: A showTimeControls toggle state variable is declared, implying a toggle/visibility control for the TimeControls section itself.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies inserting TimeControls directly below the Global Control button with no mention of a toggle or conditional visibility mechanism for the TimeControls section.
